Title: The Immaculate Room
Actors: Emile Hirsch, Kate Bosworth, Ashley Greene
Plot: 1 Room. 2 People. 50 Days. $ 5 Million. Mike and Kate, a young couple, get the once-in-a lifetime chance to win a cool five million dollars. The challenge: Live for a month in a blank space. Sticking it out for thirty days, and the five million are theirs. How difficult can it be?
